EXPLANATION: While this reference appears frequently in the bibliographies of various arXiv preprints, there is no evidence of an actual publication by Ilya Kuprov, Nicola Wagner-Rundell, and P. J. Hore with this title in the journal Progress in Nuclear Magnetic Resonance Spectroscopy or any other academic database. It appears to be a hallucinated citation that has been propagated through citation lists in AI-generated or machine-learning-focused preprints.
